clusters.justification: These terms share co-activation profiles within the salience and somato-visceral systems, representing the generalized processing of emotional valence, physiological arousal, and interoceptive states.
These concepts converge on cortico-striatal and dopaminergic circuitry responsible for computing incentive salience, processing outcomes, and guiding goal-directed choices.
These terms rely on the default mode network to mediate internally directed representations, bridging self-referential processing with the inference of others' mental states.
